Antonio Guardi

Jacopo Marcello Directing the Assault of Gallipoli
by Antonio Guardi
Italy, 18th century · 1750–60 · pen and brown ink and brush and brown wash, over black chalk; framing lines in brown ink
←Zhao Guangfu Francesco Guardi→
